entries.openingLines: In my younger and more vulnerable years my father gave me some advice that I've been turning over in my mind ever since.
entries.title: The Great Gatsby
entries.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

entries.openingLines: Once upon a time and a very good time it was there was a moocow coming down along the road and this moocow that was coming down along the road met a nicens little boy named baby tuckoo...
entries.title: A Portrait of the Artist as a Young Man
entries.author: James Joyce
